message:
feat(core): add MermaidLayoutDecisionLedger type and wire into CLI output

Add MermaidLayoutDecisionAlternative, MermaidLayoutDecisionRecord, and
MermaidLayoutDecisionLedger types with to_jsonl() serialization in
fm-core. Wire build_layout_decision_ledger into both cmd_render and
cmd_validate in fm-cli, surfacing layout_decision_ledger and
layout_decision_ledger_jsonl in JSON output.

Integration tests updated to assert both fields are present in render
and validate output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
